queue_item.action: Separate queue proposal integrity from freshness and require head-commit plus queue-update-tree binding before review or canonical application.

progress.finding: An unchanged proposal digest can prove integrity of an old inventory while failing to prove current completeness. Freshness requires a repository-head and queue-update-tree witness checked again at review and application time.
progress.verification: Both artifacts were committed through the GitHub contents API; source conclusions are bound to immutable commit ordering but not to a complete recursive tree digest.
progress.privacy_boundary: Public repository metadata only; no private chat, health, pet-health, credentials, contact data, or unreviewed uploads.

queue_item.handoff: Extend the queue proposal generator with inventory_head_commit and queue_update_tree_digest, then reject review or application when either witness differs from current state.

reason: Continuity Mining owns this additive record and preserves the review-only boundary around shared canonical state.
